final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input en,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset)
            q <= 4'b0;  // Synchronous reset
        else if (en)
            q <= d;  // Load data on enable
    end

endmodule
